query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A bright spherical light source hanging from white cables against a warm, dark background with amber and brown tones. Vertical dark lines suggest wooden paneling or structural elements in the surrounding space.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A bright spherical light source hanging from white cables, rendered with heavy radial motion blur that streaks outward from the center and softens all edges into haze. The light is aggressively overexposed, blowing out to pure white and obscuring fixture details. The surrounding warm amber and brown tones dissolve into indistinct vertical bands, producing an abstract composition where representational clarity is abandoned in favor of luminous gesture and atmospheric softness.
